name: agent-council
description: Throw three different AI models at a problem in parallel, then either have them build on each other's ideas (collaborative mode) or debate to stress-test the answer (adversarial mode) before an orchestrator delivers the final result. Ships a skill (trigger with `council:`, `debate:`, `brainstorm:`, `stress-test:`) and a standalone `AgentCouncil` agent. Automatically declines the council for trivial tasks.
